zh.lifeSummary: 當Jane Meriot於1415年6月出生在英國戴文托普善姆時，她的父親Robert Meriot27歲，母親Marjorie15歲。她於1428年與John Cole在英國戴文結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1444年10月11日在英國英格蘭戴文易德福德享年29歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Jane Meriot于1415年6月出生在英国戴文托普善姆时，她的父亲Robert Meriot27岁，母亲Marjorie15岁。她于1428年与John Cole在英国戴文结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1444年10月11日在英国英格兰戴文易德福德享年29岁。

nameMeanings.name: Meriot

variants.name: Merritt
meanings: English: variant of Merriott , Marriott , or Marritt. The last of these is most often a variant of Merriott or Marriott , but possibly in some instances from Middle English Marret or Merret, a syncopated form of Margaret, Mergeret.

nameMeanings.name: Jane
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a feminine form of John , from the Old French form Je(h)anne. Since the 17th century it has proved the most popular of the feminine forms of John, ahead of Joan and Jean . It now also commonly occurs as the second element in combinations such as Sarah-Jane. In Britain it is still one of the most frequent of all girls' names. It is not a royal name, but was borne by the tragic Lady Jane Grey ( 1537–54 ), who was unwillingly proclaimed queen in 1553 , deposed nine days later, and executed the following year. Seventy years earlier, the name had come into prominence as that of Jane Shore , mistress of King Edward IV and subsequently of Thomas Grey , 1st Marquess of Dorset, Lady Jane's grandfather. Jane Shore's tribulations in 1483 at the hands of Richard III , Edward's brother and successor, became the subject of popular ballads and plays, which may well have increased the currency of the name in the 16th century. A 19th-century influence was its use as the name of the central character in Charlotte Brontë's novel Jane Eyre ( 1847 ). From 1932 to 1959 it was used as the name of a cheerful and scantily clad beauty whose adventures were chronicled in a strip cartoon in the Daily Mirror. It is also borne by the American film stars Jane Russell ( 1921–2011 ) and Jane Fonda ( b. 1937 ).

variants.name: Jayne
meanings: Elaborated spelling of   Jane  , a form popularized no doubt by the American actress  Jayne Mansfield  (  Vera Jayne Palmer ,  1933–67 ) and British ice-dancer  Jayne Torvill  (  b. 1957 ).

variants.name: Jain
meanings: Originally a feminine form of John , from the Old French form Je(h)anne. Since the 17th century it has proved the most popular of the feminine forms of John, ahead of Joan and Jean . It now also commonly occurs as the second element in combinations such as Sarah-Jane. In Britain it is still one of the most frequent of all girls' names. It is not a royal name, but was borne by the tragic Lady Jane Grey ( 1537–54 ), who was unwillingly proclaimed queen in 1553 , deposed nine days later, and executed the following year. Seventy years earlier, the name had come into prominence as that of Jane Shore , mistress of King Edward IV and subsequently of Thomas Grey , 1st Marquess of Dorset, Lady Jane's grandfather. Jane Shore's tribulations in 1483 at the hands of Richard III , Edward's brother and successor, became the subject of popular ballads and plays, which may well have increased the currency of the name in the 16th century. A 19th-century influence was its use as the name of the central character in Charlotte Brontë's novel Jane Eyre ( 1847 ). From 1932 to 1959 it was used as the name of a cheerful and scantily clad beauty whose adventures were chronicled in a strip cartoon in the Daily Mirror. It is also borne by the American film stars Jane Russell ( 1921–2011 ) and Jane Fonda ( b. 1937 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Jane Meriot was born in June 1415, in Topsham, Devon, England, her father, Robert Meriot, was 27 and her mother, Marjorie, was 15. She married John Cole in 1428, in Devon, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 3 daughters. She died on 11 October 1444, in Ideford, Devon, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 29.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Jane Meriot est née en juin 1415, à Topsham, Devon, Angleterre, son père, Robert Meriot, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Marjorie, avait 15 ans. Elle a épousé John Cole en 1428, à Devon, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée le 11 octobre 1444, à Ideford, Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 29 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Jane Meriot im Juni 1415 in Topsham, Devon, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Robert Meriot 27 und ihre Mutter Marjorie 15. Sie hat 1428 in Devon, England John Cole geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb am 11. Oktober 1444 im Alter von 29 Jahren in Ideford, Devon, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Jane Meriot è nata il nel giugno 1415 nel Topsham, Devon, England, sua padre, Robert Meriot, aveva 27 anni e sua madre, Marjorie, aveva 15 anni. Lei sposato John Cole nel 1428, nel Devon, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 11 ottobre 1444, nel Ideford, Devon, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 29 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: Jane Meriot(이)가 1415년 6월 영국 데폰 토프샤에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Robert Meriot(은)는 27세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Marjorie(은)는 15세였다. 그녀는 1428년 영국 데폰에서 John Cole(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1444년 10월 11일 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 이데퍼드에서 29세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Jane Meriot nasceu em junho de 1415, em Topsham, Devon, Inglaterra, seu pai, Robert Meriot, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Marjorie, tinha 15 anos. Ela casou-se com John Cole em 1428, em Devon, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 11 de outubro de 1444, em Ideford, Devon, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 29 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Jane Meriot родилась июнь 1415 г. в местности топшам, девон, Англия, её отцу по имени Robert Meriot было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Marjorie, 15. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Cole в 1428 г. в местности девон, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла 11 октября 1444 г. в местности идефорд, девон, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 29 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Jane Meriot nació en junio de 1415, en Topsham, Devon, Inglaterra, su papá, Robert Meriot, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Marjorie, tenía 15 años. Se casó con John Cole en 1428, en Devon, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 11 de octubre de 1444, en Ideford, Devon, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 29 años.
